home.scienceBased_p1: All our technologies and models are based on scientific literature i.e. experimented and field-validated.
home.scienceBased_p2: With strong literature reviews and financed field studies (up to 13k).
home.eliteExigence_p1: Race briefing of elite athletes (Ruth Croft, Tom Evans, Petter Engdhal...).
home.eliteExigence_p2: From world best athletes to your hands! Minutious work must benefit to everyone.
home.communication_p1: An expertise shared to sponsors and mass audience: make data readable and accessible.
home.communication_p2: Technical studies and race statistics over many worldwide events.
home.joseph_role: Founder of Enduraw and Performance Scientist
home.joseph_p1: From his bedroom in Chamonix, Joseph spent night to build the perfect pacing plans by analyzing race profile and environmental conditions.
home.joseph_p2: As an athlete, he dedicated his Master Thesis to optimization of performance in endurance sport.
home.joseph_p3: Team Manager at Nutripure, he works with multiple elite athletes with a deep conviction: mathematics are they keys to reach the latest percents of performance.
home.anthony_p1: Deeply interested in training sciences, trickling down problematics as physiology, nutrition and psychology, Anthony is quite inquisive.
home.anthony_p2: With a Ph.D in physics, he plays with the data to guide athletes to their goals and light up many insights on running through many angles!
home.justine_p1: After studying sports management in Grenoble, Justine joined the team in work-study contract with the Win Sport School.
home.justine_p2: Justine thrives in content creation. Her curiosity leads her to share on very different subjects, races statistics or athletes palmares on Instagram.
home.valentin_p1: Studying Data Sciences, Valentin is deeply involved in his training in Parisian woods, looking for elevation gain!
home.valentin_p2: Focusing on environmental factors, he deals with their influence on the performance for mass runners and help them how to deal with them.
home.thibaut_p1: Currently completing a STAPS work-study program, he brings his expertise in physiological testing, training methodologies, and endurance performance.
home.thibaut_p2: With a strong background as an experienced runner, he combines field knowledge with a deep passion for scientific research.
home.thibaut_p3: His analytical mindset and coaching experience allow him to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights for athletes.
home.charline_p1: With a background as a nutrition engineer, she brings strong expertise in sports nutrition and energy optimization during effort.
home.charline_p2: At Enduraw, she contributes to the design and modeling of performance-driven algorithms, combining scientific rigor with technical skills.
home.charline_p3: Her analytical approach and passion for data allow her to transform complex physiological insights into smart, actionable tools for athletes.
home.antoine_p1: Belgian and passionate about performance analysis, he brings valuable experience from his time at Tudor Cycling.
home.antoine_p2: Specialized in data modeling, he transforms cycling, trail, and running performance into precise, actionable equations.
home.antoine_p3: At Enduraw, he contributes to building advanced tools that translate real-world effort into meaningful metrics, helping athletes understand and optimize their progression.
home.alex_p1: Dedicated to creating professional and impactful visuals, he captures the essence of Enduraw, its athletes, and its events through high-quality photography.
home.alex_p2: Whether on competitions, training sessions, or brand productions, he brings a sharp eye for detail and storytelling.
home.alex_p3: His work enhances our communication by showcasing the energy, authenticity, and performance at the heart of endurance sports.
home.readyToOptimize_p: Take your performance to the next level with data-driven insights and personalized strategies.

services.dashboard_desc: Analyze your Strava data with our advanced algorithms and get detailed insights on every run.
services.testing_desc: Complete physiological testing protocols to understand your body and optimize your training zones.
services.athleteSupport_desc: Personalized coaching and race strategy support for competitive athletes seeking peak performance.
services.performanceCenter_desc: Elite training camps in Chamonix with world-class facilities and expert coaching staff.
services.api_desc: Mathematics behind world best performances. Access our scientific models and data-driven intelligence.
services.getInTouch_p: Ready to optimize your performance? Let's discuss how data science can transform your training.

contact.title: CONTACT US
contact.subtitle: Choose the right team to help you achieve your goals. Click on an email to send us a message.
contact.performance_p: For athlete support, training camps, physiological testing, and performance optimization.
contact.dashboard_p: For questions about Enduraw Dashboard, Report, API, and Strava Integration features.
contact.communication_p: For general inquiries, partnerships, media requests, and other communications.

news.title: ENDURAW MEDIA
news.subtitle: Make data accessible and bring lisibility to our sports
news.instagram_p: Stay updated with our latest performance analyses, athlete insights, and research findings on Instagram.
news.stat1: 2000 athlete performance reports generated each day
news.stat4: Runner matrix and testing report coming soon

careers.title: CAREERS
careers.subtitle: Join Enduraw to build high-impact tools for performance analysis.
careers.jobIntro: We are looking for a hybrid profile to contribute to the design and development of a data-driven application, including data processing, visualization, data quality, and product feature implementation.
careers.resp1: Build application features on the frontend and/or backend.
careers.resp3: Contribute to data analysis and modeling.
careers.resp4: Collaborate with the product team on fast iterations.
careers.prof1: Strong background in data and software development.
careers.prof2: Hands-on experience with Python and/or TypeScript.
careers.applyClick: Click the link below to access the application form:
careers.spontIntro: Want to join the Enduraw team but don't see a position that fits your profile? Send us your spontaneous application!

privacy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.s1_p1: This privacy policy describes how Enduraw collects, uses and protects your personal data.
privacy.s1_1: Enduraw — SAS with a capital of €1,000
privacy.s1_2: Registered office: 330 Route du Plagnolet, 74400 Chamonix-Mont-Blanc
privacy.s1_6: Data Protection Officer (DPO): Valentin Templé — contact via communication@enduraw.co (or the address above)
privacy.s1_p2: Enduraw is responsible for data processing carried out in the context of using its services and applications.
privacy.s2_intro: We only collect data necessary for the provision, improvement and security of our services.
privacy.s2_account_li1: First name, last name, email address, password (hashed), language, country.
privacy.s2_account_li2: Information relating to the subscription or user account.
privacy.s2_activity_li1: Raw data from sensors or connected applications: heart rate, heart rate variability (HRV), movement, training duration and intensity, distance, speed, altitude, GPS, sleep and recovery.
privacy.s2_activity_li2: Technical metadata from devices used (model, OS, application version).
privacy.s2_activity_note: This data may, in some cases, constitute health data within the meaning of the GDPR.
privacy.s2_extra_li1: Age, height, weight, gender, athletic performance, personal goals, fatigue or well-being status (when you provide them).
privacy.s2_extra_li2: Data from third-party connectors (e.g. Strava), only after your explicit authorisation.
privacy.s2_pacing_title: Data for pacing plans and runner matrix
privacy.s2_pacing_li1: Time goal, nutritional habits, full Strava archive.
privacy.s2_tech_li1: IP address, device identifiers, connection logs, cookies and trackers.
privacy.s2_tech_li2: Information about application usage (crash reports, anonymised statistics, navigation).
privacy.s2_support_li1: Exchanges with customer service, feedback, communication preferences or responses to optional surveys.
privacy.s3_intro: Your data is processed for the following purposes:
privacy.s3_li1: Account creation and management: contract execution.
privacy.s3_li2: Collection and synchronisation of activity data: contract execution and, for health data, explicit consent.
privacy.s3_li3: Training analysis, generation of indicators and personalised recommendations: explicit consent (health data).
privacy.s3_li4: Continuous product improvement, statistics and research: Enduraw's legitimate interest, in aggregated or anonymised form.
privacy.s3_li5: Support, security and fraud prevention: legitimate interest and legal obligation.
privacy.s3_li6: Communication and prospecting (newsletters, notifications): consent or soft opt-in depending on the relationship.
privacy.s3_li7: Legal compliance: compliance with accounting, tax or security obligations imposed by law.
privacy.s3_p2: Your consent may be withdrawn at any time (see section 4).
privacy.s4_p1: For processing based on consent (in particular health data and certain cookies or marketing communications), you may withdraw it at any time, without retroactive effect, via:
privacy.s4_li1: the privacy settings of your Enduraw account;
privacy.s4_p2: Deletion or withdrawal of consent may limit certain features of our services.
privacy.s5_li1: your direct input during registration or use of our services;
privacy.s5_li2: voluntary synchronisation with third-party platforms or devices (smartwatches, sensors, applications...) after your consent;
privacy.s5_li3: automatic logs and interactions generated by using our application.
privacy.s5_p2: No data stream is collected without your explicit action or authorisation.
privacy.s6_p1: Your data is processed only by authorised Enduraw teams (product, data science, support, security) and, where applicable, by processors acting on our behalf under GDPR-compliant contracts.
privacy.s6_li3: Support and technical incident tracking tools
privacy.s6_p3: No transfer to unauthorised third parties is made without your explicit consent.
privacy.s6_p4: The updated list of our processors is available upon request at communication@enduraw.co
privacy.s7_intro: We retain your data for strictly necessary periods:
privacy.s7_li1: Account and activity data: as long as the account is active, then deletion or anonymisation within 12 months following account deletion.
privacy.s7_li2: Security and access logs: from 6 months to 2 years depending on criticality.
privacy.s7_li3: Communication or support data: 3 years after the last contact.
privacy.s7_li4: Aggregated or anonymised data: retained indefinitely.
privacy.s8_intro: Enduraw implements appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data:
privacy.s8_li1: Data encryption at rest and in transit (HTTPS, AES-256)
privacy.s8_li2: Storage on secure AWS US-east servers
privacy.s8_li4: Anonymisation and pseudonymisation of sensitive data
privacy.s8_li6: Encrypted backups and business continuity plan
privacy.s8_li7: Notification to authorities (CNIL) and data subjects in case of a high-risk breach
privacy.s9_intro: In accordance with the GDPR and the French Data Protection Act, you have the following rights:
privacy.s9_li1: Right of access to your data;
privacy.s9_li2: Right of rectification of inaccurate information;
privacy.s9_li3: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten");
privacy.s9_li5: Right to object, in particular for prospecting;
privacy.s9_li6: Right to withdraw consent at any time;
privacy.s9_li7: Right to define the fate of your data after your death (post-mortem directive in France).
privacy.s9_p2: You can exercise these rights by contacting:
privacy.s9_p3: or by post to: Enduraw, 330 Route du Plagnolet, 74400 Chamonix-Mont-Blanc.
privacy.s9_p4: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL
privacy.s10_p1: Enduraw services are not intended for children under 15 (minimum age for digital consent in France).
privacy.s10_p2: If a minor under 15 uses our services, the consent of the holder of parental authority is required.
privacy.s10_p3: Any data collected without this consent will be deleted upon detection.
privacy.s11_p1: Enduraw does not carry out any automated decision-making that has legal or significant effects on users.
privacy.s11_p2: Performance indicators, scores, training recommendations and any other automatically generated content are provided for informational purposes only. They do not in any way constitute medical advice, a diagnosis or binding personalised advice.
privacy.s11_p3: The user remains entirely responsible for their choices and the application of recommendations, and must, if necessary, consult a qualified health professional before taking any action based on this information.
privacy.s11_p4: Enduraw may use certain data for analysis or profiling purposes solely to improve services, without making individual decisions with legal or financial impact on the user.
privacy.s12_p1: We may modify this privacy policy at any time to adapt to our technical, legal or organisational changes.
privacy.s12_p2: Any update will be published on this page, and a notification will be sent to users if the changes are significant.
privacy.s12_p3: We encourage users to regularly consult this page to stay informed about data protection practices.
privacy.s13_p1: For any questions about this policy or the management of your personal data:

raceBriefing.subtitle: Enduraw provides race briefings for the best athletes in the world.
raceBriefing.p1: Race day is a leap into the unknown! You don't control the weather like you do in training. You don't know the race route and its elevation gain by heart. You're wondering about your nutrition.
raceBriefing.p3: Over the past two years, we've developed a unique expertise in working with elite athletes to provide them with the best possible briefing and enable them to optimize their performances. In top-level sport, every second counts, every heartbeat is important. You need to adapt your pace precisely to get the best energy expenditure.
raceBriefing.p4: We are convinced that you need these algorithms to perform, whether you want to run a marathon in under 3h30 or finish a trail race. To each his own challenge.
raceBriefing.splitPace: Your split pace kilometer by kilometer
raceBriefing.availability: Available in English, Spanish, French • Discounts for 3 or more briefing plans
raceBriefing.goFurther_p1: For top-athletes aiming for international titles or world records we have a tailor made solution.
raceBriefing.hyperCustomization: The future of sport is all about hyper-customization
raceBriefing.premiumFeatures: That's why we're using several premium features to help you reach the top:
raceBriefing.stravaAnalysis: Your Strava analysis to fine-tune the algorithms
raceBriefing.heartRatePrediction: Heart rate response prediction during exercise (WIP)
raceBriefing.sweatProfile: Estimation of your sweat profile to adapt hydration
raceBriefing.competitorsAnalysis: Competitors analysis and matchmaking with pace groups (marathon)
raceBriefing.dataTradeoffs: Our job is to give you the data you need to make trade-offs.
raceBriefing.contactCta: If you are interested, drop me a message here.

endurawAPI.subtitle: Mathematics behind world best performances
endurawAPI.intelligence_p: From science-based models, Enduraw aims to extract as much information as possible from every data. Validated with elite athletes, our toolbox brings new figures to push performance forward.
endurawAPI.weatherModel_p: Quantify and correct the impact of weather and elevation on time-trial performance.
endurawAPI.physioProfile_p: Leverage years of data to map physiological strengths and personalize training.
endurawAPI.equipmentImpact_p: Measure time impact based on athlete morphology and course specifics.
endurawAPI.discrepancy_p: Explain or predict performance gaps under extreme weather conditions.
endurawAPI.scientificValidation_p: Our mathematical models are validated with elite athletes and real-world performance data. Each formula is backed by extensive research and proven results in competitive environments.
endurawAPI.sv_li3: Continuous model refinement based on feedback
endurawAPI.techIntegration_p: Our API provides seamless integration with existing training platforms and data sources. Access real-time calculations and historical analysis through our robust infrastructure.

pacingPlan.subtitle: For the best athletes in the world.
pacingPlan.experiencePower_p: See how our advanced pacing algorithms can transform your race performance
pacingPlan.raceDay_p1: Race day is a leap into the unknown! You don't control the weather like you do in training. You don't know the race route and its elevation gain by heart. You're wondering about your nutrition.
pacingPlan.expertise_p: Over the past two years, we've developed a unique expertise in working with elite athletes to provide them with the best possible briefing and enable them to optimize their performances. In top-level sport, every second counts, every heartbeat is important. You need to adapt your pace precisely to get the best energy expenditure.
pacingPlan.readyToOptimize_p: Whether you want to run a marathon in under 3h30 or finish a trail race. We want to help you reaching your optimum performance.
pacingPlan.pacingPerStation: Your pacing plan per aid station
pacingPlan.weatherAtStations: Weather at different aid stations to choose the right equipment
pacingPlan.splitPace: Your split pace kilometer by kilometer
pacingPlan.learnMoreTech_p: Discover the science and innovation behind our pacing algorithms

athleteSupport.subtitle: You have the fire, we have the spark.
athleteSupport.intro_p1: Being an accomplished athlete does not only rely on a good training plan.
athleteSupport.intro_p2: At Enduraw, we support a holistic vision of performance, from training optimization to detailed sleep analysis.
athleteSupport.intro_p3: Thanks to data-driven insights, we hyper-personalize your training to bring you into a new dimension.
athleteSupport.intro_p4: No matter what you aim for, we know you want to do it at your best. And so do we!
athleteSupport.keysTitle: THE KEYS WE CAN BRING YOU
athleteSupport.trainingAnalysis_content: Analysis of your training sessions and monitoring
athleteSupport.historicalProfiling_content: Profiling from your historical training and racing data
athleteSupport.performanceFactors_content: Races comparisons and determination of key performance factors
athleteSupport.nutritionGuidance_content: Nutrition over training and races alongside advices on best practice for endurance athletes
athleteSupport.refuelingStrategy_content: Bring the keys to an improved refueling using the right electrolytes and water sources
athleteSupport.sleepAnalysis_content: Sleep Monitoring and analysis to get the best recovery
athleteSupport.offers_p: As your partner on every adventure, we offer a Seasonal Support coaching format designed to match your goals, your racing calendar, and your expected level of support.
athleteSupport.ss_li1: Monthly planning tailored to your goals.
athleteSupport.ss_li2: Scientific advice to optimize your training.
athleteSupport.ss_li4: Phone and email support with replies within 48h.
athleteSupport.ss_li5: Pacing strategies for your main competitions.
athleteSupport.ss_li6: One monthly visioconference on a technical subject (training optimization, race analysis, and more).
athleteSupport.smartTraining_p: We analyze biological and mechanical load markers to turn your data into clear training decisions.
athleteSupport.recoveryFirst_p: Progress comes from adaptation. We help you optimize recovery through refueling and sleep insights.
athleteSupport.precisionPacing_p: We build race pacing strategies from your historical data to help you execute with confidence.
athleteSupport.chooseOption: Want help choosing the right option for your profile? Reach out and we can schedule a call.
athleteSupport.eliteOffer_p: An elite athlete standing offer is available on demand, with highly limited capacity.

performanceCenter.subtitle: Elite training camps in the heart of the Alps with world-class facilities, expert coaching staff, and legendary UTMB trails
performanceCenter.eliteCoaching_desc: Train with world-class coaches who work with Tom Evans and Ruth Croft
performanceCenter.performanceTesting_desc: Complete VO₂max and biomechanical analysis by Belgian Biathlon Team experts
performanceCenter.utmbTrails_desc: Train on legendary UTMB routes in the heart of the Alps
performanceCenter.luxuryAccommodation_desc: Stay in a premium alpine chalet with gourmet meals by INEOS chef
performanceCenter.limitedSpots: Two exclusive training camps in May 2025. Limited spots available.
performanceCenter.included_li2: All gourmet meals by INEOS chef
performanceCenter.bookSelected: You selected {{stage}}. Fill in the form below to reserve your spot.
performanceCenter.bookGeneric: Select a stage above and fill in the form to reserve your spot in this exclusive training camp.
performanceCenter.trusted_p: Our coaching staff has worked with UTMB champions Tom Evans and Ruth Croft, Belgian Biathlon Team athletes, and INEOS Grenadiers cyclists. Now it's your turn to train like a pro.

physiologicalTesting.subtitle: To make you the best, we need data
physiologicalTesting.protocols_p1: Tests are a great way to understand your level and physiological profile. They will help us to train you better and provide you with the most personalized pacing plans possible.
physiologicalTesting.protocols_p2: It's an essential investment, because all athletes are different, and it's easy to train badly if you don't define your thresholds.
physiologicalTesting.walkRun_goal: The goal is, regarding the gradient, to calculate your:
physiologicalTesting.walkRun_p: To precisely advise you on your pacing during a trail running race. We'll tell you when to walk, when to run and when to use the poles to optimize your energy expenditure and therefore your result at the finish line.
physiologicalTesting.interested_p: Send us your Name, Surname, Email and the test you are interested in / questions.
physiologicalTesting.sensors_soon: Soon an Enduraw article for each sensor (you can access the websites by clicking on the logos).
physiologicalTesting.sensors_linkedin: If you have any question on the sensors, please send us a message on LinkedIn!
physiologicalTesting.stryd_desc: Cadence, GCT, flight time, stride length

endurawReport.analytics_p: The Enduraw Report provides in-depth analysis of your training and performance data, offering actionable insights to optimize your athletic development.
endurawReport.dataViz_p: Clear charts and graphs showing your performance trends
endurawReport.progressTracking_p: Monitor improvements and identify areas for focus
endurawReport.trainingLoad_p: Comprehensive breakdown of your training stress, volume, and intensity patterns with recommendations for load management.
endurawReport.performancePred_p: Data-driven predictions for upcoming races and events based on your current fitness and training trajectory.
endurawReport.getReport_p: Contact us to request your personalized performance report and unlock deeper insights into your training.

stravaIntegration.subtitle: A Strava Integration
stravaIntegration.subtitle2: The best sports algorithms for all your runs!
stravaIntegration.p1: You can't accelerate under 29 degrees? You thought you had a good pace, but with that 100-meter bump, it's impossible to know? How much speed has the wind taken away from you on this race?
stravaIntegration.p2: That's to be expected. Outside conditions reduce your pace. 🥵 💨
stravaIntegration.p3: But it's impossible to know how much. Whether it's the wind, the elevation gain, the temperature or the altitude, it's impossible to know your true state of fitness.
stravaIntegration.p4: Enduraw has the solution! We're putting at your disposal the formulas we've developed with elite athletes to enable you to compare your training and more accurately estimate the intensity of your session. 📈
stravaIntegration.p5: After each outing, our integration will automatically update your activity with the paces adjusted to the conditions. Our API calls retrieve wind strength, outside temperature and your pace and altitude data a few seconds after the end of your run!
stravaIntegration.p6: So you get an instant report and the time you would have saved in normal conditions 🎉
stravaIntegration.step1: Click on the link above to go to the home page
stravaIntegration.step3: Log in with your username and password
stravaIntegration.step4: You'll be taken to the Strava login page
stravaIntegration.step5: Log in using their secure page, which gives us access to your activities
stravaIntegration.step6: Once logged in, you will receive a validation e-mail
stravaIntegration.step7: On your first run, upload your activity to Strava; the Enduraw report magically appears!
stravaIntegration.step8: ⚠️ Don't change your description before the report updates
stravaIntegration.ps: PS: you can disable the report anytime
stravaIntegration.wantAccess_p: Get in touch to integrate Enduraw's advanced analytics with your Strava data and elevate your training.

endurawDashboard.stravaIntegration_sub: A tool to better understand your training
endurawDashboard.quote: "Another tough session in the books! But what a windy day... I'm sure I would have recorded my FKT without!"
endurawDashboard.p1: Every athlete knows that wind and heat can be powerful enemies in a training or a race.
endurawDashboard.p2: Ever trained at high altitude? Oxygen deprecation is real!
endurawDashboard.p3: But how to quantify the impact of these parameters of your performance?
endurawDashboard.p4: With Enduraw's Strava Integration, your pace can be adjusted according to
endurawDashboard.p5: Giving you a full readibility of your session, it gives you keys to analyze your training under external conditions and adapt it.
endurawDashboard.interested_p: Contact us to learn more about accessing the dashboard and how it can help optimize your performance.

testing.subtitle: Learn more about your physiology and what makes you a great athlete
testing.testingLocations_p: Professional testing services available at both our Paris and Chamonix facilities
testing.preTestConsultation_p: Comprehensive health screening and goal assessment
testing.bookNow_p2: Select your time slot and test protocol in just a few clicks.
testing.noSlots: None of the time slots work for me.
testing.noSlots_p: For specific questions or custom time slots, feel free to contact us or join our waiting list to be notified of new slots.
testing.testingBusiness_p: Invest in your team's health and performance. Our corporate testing programs help employees understand their physiology, optimize their training, and improve overall well-being.
testing.companyReports_p: Aggregated insights for HR and wellness teams
testing.flexibleScheduling_p: On-site or in-lab options to fit your needs
